lesson.title: Subjunctive with Conjunctions
lesson.instructions: cuando (future), para que, antes de que, aunque

exercises.prompt: I will call you when I arrive.
I am telling you this so that you know it.
exercises.answer: Te lo digo para que lo sepas.

exercises.prompt: Finish your work before you leave.
exercises.answer: Termina tu trabajo antes de que salgas.

exercises.prompt: Aunque sea difícil, voy a intentarlo.
exercises.answer: Even if it is difficult, I’m going to try.

exercises.prompt: She studies so that she can pass the exam.
exercises.answer: Ella estudia para que pueda aprobar el examen.

exercises.prompt: Antes de que tú salgas, habla conmigo.
exercises.answer: Before you leave, talk with me.

exercises.prompt: Even if he doesn’t want to go, we will go.
I’ll visit you when I have time.
Aunque no me guste, lo haré.
exercises.answer: Even if I do not like it, I will do it.
